description: Official Weblisk project templates — client and server

client/default.description: Minimal client — counter island, service worker, 404 page

client/blog.description: Blog with posts, about page, theme toggle, dark mode

client/dashboard.description: Admin dashboard with stat cards, settings, live counter

client/docs.description: Documentation site with sidebar navigation and dark mode

client/blueprint-site.description: Full site described as YAML blueprints — pages, components, islands, theme

server/starter.description: Minimal server — orchestrator, gateway, one domain, one agent
